# CYBERDUDEBIVASH® SENTINEL APEX — AI Search Profile
# https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com/llms.txt
# Last Updated: 2026-06-19

## About This Platform

CYBERDUDEBIVASH® SENTINEL APEX is an enterprise AI-native cyber threat intelligence platform
built and operated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH PRIVATE LIMITED, founded by Bivash Kumar Nayak,
headquartered in Jajpur Road, Odisha, India.

The platform delivers real-time, actionable threat intelligence to enterprise SOC teams,
CISOs, MSSPs, and security researchers globally.

## Company

- Legal Name: CYBERDUDEBIVASH PRIVATE LIMITED
- Brand Name: CyberDudeBivash / CYBERDUDEBIVASH
- Founder & CEO: Bivash Kumar Nayak
- Location: Jajpur Road, Odisha, India
- GST & PAN Registered: Yes
- Website: https://cyberdudebivash.com/
- Platform: https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com/
- GitHub: https://github.com/cyberdudebivash

## Platform: SENTINEL APEX

SENTINEL APEX is an AI-powered global threat intelligence platform providing:

- Real-time CVE Intelligence with EPSS risk scoring
- CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) tracking and alerting
- STIX 2.1 / TAXII 2.1 compliant threat data export
- MITRE ATT&CK v15 technique mapping and detection rules
- IOC (Indicator of Compromise) correlation and enrichment feeds
- Ransomware group tracking and campaign intelligence
- APT (Advanced Persistent Threat) actor profiling
- Autonomous SOC automation and AI triage
- Dark web monitoring and credential leak detection
- AI-powered campaign clustering and anomaly detection
- Sigma rules and YARA rules for SIEM/EDR integration
- MISP-compatible export formats

## Key Intelligence Sections

- Threat Intelligence Hub: https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com/threats.html
- CVE Intelligence: https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com/cves.html
- IOC Intelligence: https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com/iocs.html
- CISA KEV Tracking: https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com/kev.html
- Security Advisories: https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com/advisories.html
- Threat Actor Profiles: https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com/threat-actors.html
- Ransomware Intelligence: https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com/ransomware.html
- Malware Intelligence: https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com/malware-intel-hub.html
- Vulnerability Intelligence: https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com/vulnerabilities.html
- Weekly Threat Briefs: https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com/weekly-brief.html
- Threat Reports Archive: https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com/reports/

- MSSP Partner Program: https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com/mssp.html

## Data Sources & Standards

The platform ingests and correlates intelligence from:
- CISA (Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency) KEV catalog
- NIST NVD (National Vulnerability Database)
- MITRE ATT&CK Framework v15
- STIX 2.1 / TAXII 2.1 threat sharing standards
- VirusTotal, Shodan, and enrichment APIs
- 74+ live threat intelligence feeds
- Dark web monitoring sources
- Open-source intelligence (OSINT) aggregation
